capacity.description: The maximum number of people the room can hold.

location.description: The physical location of the room.

status.description: The current status of the room (e.g., Đang hoạt động, Đang triển khai hoán cải).

color.description: A color code to represent the room in the UI.

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: A booking for a meeting room.

roomId.description: The ID of the booked room.

userName.description: The name of the user who made the booking.

userEmail.description: The email of the user who made the booking.

project.description: The project associated with the meeting.

purpose.description: The purpose or notes for the meeting.

startTime.description: The start time of the booking (ISO string).

endTime.description: The end time of the booking (ISO string).

date.description: The date of the booking in YYYY-MM-DD format for easy querying.

repeatGroupId.description: An ID to group repeating bookings together.
